title: Hotkey to Hotbar Fix
description: Fix newer game version behaviour that prevents usage of a-Z hotkeys to move items from the creative search menu into hotbar.
body:
Fix newer game version behaviour that prevents usage of a-Z hotkeys to move items from the creative search menu into hotbar.

When in the search tab, if you hover over an item and try to use your (a-Z) hotbar hotkeys to move the item into the respective slot, it will append text to your search instead. This mod changes this behaviour so that a-Z hotkeys move items into the hotbar instead.
